synopsis:
News of Shira Brie's death spreads through the Rebel base at Salvation. Luke Skywalker is consumed by grief and feels the Force betrayed him by letting him fire on her fighter. The other personnel look down on him, and a belligerent soldier named Milo Fourstar accuses him of deliberately killing Shira because she spurned his advances.

Seeking answers, Luke asks Lando for the *Millennium Falcon* to return to Shira's homeworld. Under orders to refuse, Lando instead hints that the ship will be left unguarded for fifteen minutes. Luke and Chewbacca fly to Shalyvane and land at Chinshassa, where Em'liy warriors immediately attack. Hiding in an underground warren, they find an injured old Em'liy named G'hinji, who reveals that Chinshassa has never had a Human settlement, meaning Shira's story was a lie. Remembering a bloodletting ritual he once saw Shira perform at the Circle of Kavaan, Luke slices open his palm and lets his blood drip onto the ruined cairns. In a brilliant flash of light, Darth Vader appears before them.
title: Star Wars (1977) #62: Pariah!
